summary: Re-verified backend (26/26 pytest pass) and exercised all frontend flows requested in the review: cube→welcome reveal, scroll-to-about with welcome staying fixed, about-back button below frame__title, scroll-back-up to welcome, about-back returns home, Past Projects flow (6 cards), projects-back, welcome-close standalone, hash deeplinks (#about, #projects, /), admin login (jaxstudio2026) → page 5 → edit + publish → GET /api/settings round-trip, live-preview body, and photo upload. All flows behave exactly as described.

issues: During the welcome→projects exit animation a fragment of the welcome small 'BACK' arrow briefly overlaps the top-left 'JAX STUDIO' frame title (mid-animation only). Once projects finish revealing, the layout is clean (frame title is the only top-left element). Cosmetic, not a blocker.

verified_behaviors.welcome_overlay_after_scroll: position: fixed, z-index 50, is-active + is-revealed retained (welcome no longer slides off screen)
verified_behaviors.about_section_after_scroll: is-active true, margin-top: 1080px (=100vh), z-index 60, body.is-scrollable true, scrollY=1080 after smooth-scroll
verified_behaviors.about_back_position: top=84px, left=39px (frame__title.bottom=70px → about-back sits BELOW brand title with ~14px clearance)
verified_behaviors.scroll_back_to_welcome: window.scrollTo({top:0}) brings welcome back to viewport top; welcome.getBoundingClientRect().top=0, scrollY=0
verified_behaviors.about_back_click: clears body.is-scrollable, deactivates welcome+about, scrollY=0, hash cleared
verified_behaviors.past_projects: welcome dismisses, .projects active, 6 cards rendered, hash=#projects
verified_behaviors.hash_deeplinks: #about → welcome.is-active+is-revealed + about.is-active + body.is-scrollable + scrolled to about; #projects → projects.is-active + 6 cards rendered (verified visually); / → cube only, all sections inactive
verified_behaviors.admin_panel: pager 1/5 → 5/5 after 4 nexts; all 10 page-5 about fields present (about-eyebrow, about-heading-pre, about-heading-emphasis, about-body, about-photo-input, about-name, about-role, about-years, about-skills, about-tools); status='Published — visitors will see this now.' on save
verified_behaviors.round_trip_settings: PUT eyebrow='TEST_EYEBROW_2026' + body='Live preview test body content' → GET /api/settings reflects both → about__eyebrow DOM updates to TEST_EYEBROW_2026
verified_behaviors.live_preview_body: .about__body updates as user types in admin textarea (no publish needed)
verified_behaviors.photo_upload: Tiny PNG → GET /api/settings.about_photo_url=/api/uploads/about-fb51b615a8.png (file served by backend)

critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/js/index.js is large; growing complexity would benefit from splitting admin/welcome/about/projects modules into their own files for maintainability (not blocking).

Admin panel's pager-next/prev buttons are inside a sticky/absolutely-positioned footer — Playwright's standard click without force can fail with 'Element is outside of the viewport' even when visually visible; consider adding scroll-margin or relocating slightly. Workaround: clicking via element.click() works.
seed_data_creation: During test, eyebrow & body were temporarily changed to TEST_EYEBROW_2026 / 'Live preview test body content'; restored to defaults via PUT /api/admin/settings (returned 200) before finishing. Photo upload created /app/backend/uploads/about-fb51b615a8.png (small PNG, harmless test artifact).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Welcome class is .welcome-overlay (NOT .welcome). About section back button uses class .projects__back with data-testid='about-back'. Project cards use selector [data-testid^='project-card'] (.projects__card may not match every code path). Admin pager buttons use data-testid='admin-pager-next'/'admin-pager-prev', publish uses data-testid='admin-publish-btn', login submit can be triggered with Enter key. Admin pager-next button is in a sticky footer; use element.click() via evaluate if Playwright reports 'outside of viewport'. To fully restore admin defaults, call POST /api/admin/settings/reset with admin Bearer token.
